scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix Backend" "npm run dev --prefix Frontend/StreamSync"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix Frontend/StreamSync" "npm run dev --prefix Electron"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix Frontend/StreamSync && npm install --prefix Electron
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --prefix Frontend/StreamSync && npm run build:win --prefix Electron
scripts.release:desktop: npm run build --prefix Frontend/StreamSync && npm run release:win --prefix Electron
